occurrence_sentence: Rigetti UK Leads £10 Million Consortium to Bolster Quantum Computing Commercialization
The Rigetti-led consortium to bring the first commercial quantum computer to the UK includes Oxford Instruments, University of Edinburgh, Phasecraft and Standard Chartered Bank.
The Rigetti-led consortium to bring the first commercial quantum computer to the UK includes Oxford Instruments, University of Edinburgh, Phasecraft and Standard Chartered Bank.
The Rigetti-led consortium to bring the first commercial quantum computer to the UK includes Oxford Instruments, University of Edinburgh, Phasecraft and Standard Chartered Bank.
The Rigetti-led consortium to bring the first commercial quantum computer to the UK includes Oxford Instruments, University of Edinburgh, Phasecraft and Standard Chartered Bank.

Rigetti UK announced [today](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2020/09/02/2087495/0/en/Rigetti-Computing-to-Lead-10M-Consortium-to-Launch-First-Commercial-Quantum-Computer-in-UK.html) in a news release that it will lead a £10 million consortium to accelerate the commercialization of quantum computing in the UK.
